zh.Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Craddock於大約1598年出生在英國。他於大約1635年與Elizabeth Hutchins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1685年1月9日在美國北卡羅來納州帕斯坦可享年88歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

zh-hans.Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Craddock于大约1598年出生在英国。他于大约1635年与Elizabeth Hutchins在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1685年1月9日在美国北卡罗来纳州帕斯坦可享年88岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可。

nameMeanings.name: Craddock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Caradawc, Cradawc, Caradoc, Caradog meaning ‘amiable’, familiar in its Latin form Caractacus (but correctly Caratacus, for British Celtic Caratācos, from the stem carat- ‘dear, love’), a British prince who was taken as prisoner to Rome in about 51 AD for his leadership of a revolt against the Roman occupation.
Americanized form of German   Gredig  . Compare   Graddick  .

variants.name: Cradduck
meanings: Welsh and English (Kent): variant of   Craddock  .

variants.name: Cradick
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Craddock  . Compare   Cradit  .

variants.name: Craddick
meanings: English (Staffordshire) and Welsh: variant of   Craddock  .

variants.name: Cradic
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Craddock  . This surname is concentrated in TN.

variants.name: Gredig
meanings: habitational name from a place called Greding in Bavaria.

variants.name: Graddick
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English Craddick, itself a variant of Craddock .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Craddock was born about 1598, in England. He married Elizabeth Hutchins about 1635, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 9 January 1685, in Pasquotank, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 88, and was buried in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Craddockは約1598年にイギリスで生まれた。約1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコでElizabeth Hutchinsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1685年1月9日にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州プアスクオタンクで88歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ヘンリコにて埋葬された。

ko.Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial Amer: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코
ko.Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코 바리나
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Craddock(은)는 대략 1598년 영국에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 Elizabeth Hutchins(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1685년 1월 9일 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 파스크탠크에서 88세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Craddock nasceu aproximadamente 1598, em Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hutchins aproximadamente 1635, em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1685, em Pasquotank, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 88 anos, e foi sepultado em Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.Varina, Henrico, Virginia, British Colon: варина, хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Richard Craddock родился около 1598 г. в местности Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hutchins около 1635 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 9 января 1685 г. в местности паскуотанк, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 88 лет и был похоронен в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.
